title: Door Check Stop Strap No.6863047031 Rear Side Door Check Stopper Limiter Assembly for Prius 2011 2012 2013 2014 2015 Door Hinge Replacement Accessories
features: 【Exact OE Fit & Finish】Precision-engineered to match OE specifications (Part # 6863047031, 68630-47031), ensuring seamless compatibility and a perfect fit with your vehicle's door latch system for reliable performance.
【Compatibility】This door limiter assembly is a direct replacement part from the original manufacturer and is designed specifically for the rear doors of the 2011-2015 T-oyota P-rius.
【Performance】The door limiting hinges effectively restrict door movement, preventing excessive opening or sudden closing. This minimizes wear and tear and improves overall driving safety.
【Rugged and durable】This door lock strike plate is made of high-quality corrosion-resistant metal, making it durable and able to withstand repeated use and harsh environmental conditions.
【Easy installation】Pre-drilled mounting holes and a simple design allow for direct replacement of original parts. Streamline your repair process and quickly restore normal door function.
description: Features: 1. The car door strap is made of durable metal material, durable and anti-rust, and gets a longer service life after daily use. 2. Replace the door support assembly when the door has a noisy sound or is clunky and difficult to open and close. 3. The car door check bracket will be aging, cracking, and rusty connectors after long-term use, and the mounting hole of the bracket will become egg-shaped, affecting the use of the door. 4. Please Note: Please ensure this part is suitable for your vehicle before purchasing. 5. This is a non-OEM product, accessory ONLY!
